message:
feat(abi): nativize ~60 glibc internal symbols, replacing dlsym passthrough with direct delegation

Replace dlsym_passthrough!() with native Rust implementations for:
- __pthread_* internal aliases (~11 symbols): mutex, rwlock, key,
  once, setspecific forwarding to pthread_abi
- Public pthread extras (~12 symbols): _np variants, prioceiling
  stubs, robust/kind attribute accessors
- __libc_* malloc aliases (~8 symbols): allocate_rtsig, sa_len,
  init_first (calloc/free/malloc already native)
- String/locale wrappers (~20+ symbols): __str*_l, __stpcpy,
  __rawmemchr, __mempcpy, __memcmpeq, __bzero, __ffs
- Fortified inet wrappers: __inet_ntop_chk, __inet_pton_chk with
  buffer size validation and abort on overflow
- Misc: __cmsg_nxthdr, __posix_getopt, __register_atfork, strptime_l

Update support_matrix.json: 46 symbols promoted from
GlibcCallThrough to Implemented.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
